meaning: vt.使沉溺,使上瘾;n.入迷的人,有瘾的人
examples: She is a TV addict and watches as much as she can.
Naylor acknowledged, in a letter to the judge, that he was a drug addict.
What an Internet addict usually does?
And who was the doctor (or doctors) who prescribed a known addict with prescription drugs?
Holing up in a tech dead-zone sounds like nonsense to many an Internet addict.
